Portfolio 2024 — مجموعة الأعمال

Dr. Yassmin
Allam

د. ياسمين علام

A multi-disciplinary creative who weaves visual art, interior design, art education, and therapeutic practice into a singular, coherent vision.

Visual ArtInterior DesignArt EducationArt Therapy
Experience
15+
Years of Practice
My Philosophy
فلسفتي في الفن
"Art is not a discipline — it is a language. I use it to design spaces that breathe, teach minds that wonder, and heal hearts that ache."

My practice was born from a single conviction: that creativity, in all its forms, is a force for human transformation. Whether I am mixing pigments on a canvas, selecting textures for an interior, guiding a student's first brushstroke, or sitting quietly beside a client as they process grief through color — I am doing the same work. I am making space for the human experience to be seen, held, and honored.

The four disciplines I practice are not separate chapters — they are the same story told in different voices. Interior design is visual art applied to the spaces we inhabit. Education is creativity multiplied across generations. Therapy is the moment when art stops being beautiful and becomes necessary.

Dr. Yassmin Allam

دول
Chapter 01

Visual Art

الفن البصري

Original paintings and mixed-media works that explore identity, memory, and the visual grammar of the Arab world.

My studio practice spans oil painting, mixed media, and large-scale installation. I work primarily in figurative abstraction — paintings that carry recognizable forms while resisting literal interpretation. My subjects are drawn from personal memory, cultural inheritance, and the emotional textures of daily life.

2023

Layers of Belonging

A nine-canvas series exploring the tension between cultural identity and diaspora. Oil, gold leaf, and Arabic calligraphy on linen.

Chapter 02

Interior Design

التصميم الداخلي

Spaces designed as total environments — where architecture, art, and lived experience converge.

My interior design practice is inseparable from my work as a visual artist. Every space I design is conceived as a curated environment — not a collection of objects, but a unified experience. I work closely with clients to understand how they inhabit space before I touch a single surface.

Cairo 2023

Zamalek Penthouse

A full transformation of a 400m² penthouse. The brief asked for contemporary luxury that honored traditional Arabesque motifs. Custom joinery, hand-painted zellige, bespoke furniture.

Chapter 03

Art Education

التعليم الفني

Teaching as a creative act — cultivating the next generation of artists, thinkers, and visual communicators.

I have taught at undergraduate and graduate levels for over a decade, and also run a thriving independent program for children, adolescents, and adults. My teaching philosophy holds that everyone is creative — the work of education is to remove the obstacles that hide that fact.

Graduate Level

Advanced Studio Practice

A semester-long graduate studio course exploring conceptual development, material experimentation, and professional critique. Delivered at Cairo University Fine Arts.

Chapter 04

Art Therapy

العلاج بالفن

When art becomes a pathway to healing — working with individuals and groups to support emotional wellbeing, trauma recovery, and psychological growth.

With over 12 years of clinical practice, I offer art therapy as a BAAT-accredited practitioner. My approach is trauma-informed, person-centered, and grounded in the belief that creativity is an innate human capacity for healing — not a talent that needs to be earned.

Sessions are conducted in Arabic and English. I work with adults, adolescents, and children in both individual and group settings.

Workshop Programs

those who know

Interior Design · Cairo, Egypt
